    G

    generate(String, String, String, String, boolean, boolean, boolean, String, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.CaptureService
    Generates a deterministic SHAFT TestNG test from a persisted Capture session.
    generateReplay(String, String, String, String, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, String) - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.CaptureService
    Generates, compiles, and optionally replays a deterministic SHAFT TestNG test from a Capture session.
    generateTestReport() - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.EngineService
    Generate a test report for the current session.
    getAccessibilityTree(int) - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.MobileService
    Returns the current native accessibility XML tree or mobile web source.
    getAllCookies() - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.BrowserService
    Retrieves all cookies from the current browser session.
    getContexts(int) - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.MobileService
    Returns Appium contexts and a bounded current page source.
    getCookie(String) - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.BrowserService
    Retrieves a cookie by name from the current browser session.
    getCssValue(locatorStrategy, String, String) - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.ElementService
    Gets a CSS value for direct Java callers.
    getCurrentUrl() - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.BrowserService
    Retrieves the current URL of the browser.
    getDomAttribute(locatorStrategy, String, String) - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.ElementService
    Gets a DOM attribute for direct Java callers.
    getDomProperty(locatorStrategy, String, String) - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.ElementService
    Gets a DOM property for direct Java callers.
    getPageDom(int) - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.BrowserService
    Captures the current page DOM for MCP browser automation inspection.
    getPageSource() - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.EngineService
    Get the source code of the current page.
    getText(locatorStrategy, String) - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.ElementService
    Gets text for direct Java callers.
    getTitle() - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.BrowserService
    Retrieves the title of the current page in the browser.

    navigate(String) - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.BrowserService
    Navigates the browser to the specified URL.
    navigateBack() - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.BrowserService
    Navigates back to the previous page in the browser's history.
    navigateForward() - Method in class com.shaft.mcp.BrowserService
    Navigates forward to the next page in the browser's history.

    Navigates the browser to the specified URL using Basic Authentication.
